# ngrok_secret (Data Source)

Use this data source to look up a secret by ID or name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "ngrok_secret" "example" {
  id = "secret_2example"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) Unique secret resource identifier. Provide either id or name.
- `name` (String) Human-readable name of the secret. Provide either id or name.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Timestamp when the Secret was created (RFC 3339 format)
- `created_by_id` (String) The ID of the user or bot that created the secret.
- `description` (String) description of Secret
- `last_updated_by_id` (String) The ID of the user or bot that last updated the secret.
- `metadata` (String) Arbitrary user-defined metadata for this Secret
- `updated_at` (String) Timestamp when the Secret was last updated (RFC 3339 format)
- `uri` (String) URI of this Secret API resource
- `vault_id` (String) ID of the vault that this secret belongs to.
- `vault_name` (String) Name of the vault the secret is stored in
